config.description: Mount `configuration.yaml` from an existing Kubernetes resource. Use `existingSecret` for configs containing credentials (MQTT passwords, network keys). Use `existingConfigMap` for configs without sensitive data (ignored when `existingSecret` is set). The resource must contain a key named `configuration.yaml`. Mutually exclusive with `externalSecrets` — use one approach, not both.

existingConfigMap.description: Name of an existing ConfigMap containing `configuration.yaml`.

existingSecret.description: Name of an existing Secret containing `configuration.yaml`.

device.description: Host device path for the Zigbee USB adapter (e.g. `/dev/ttyUSB0` or `/dev/serial/by-id/...`). When set, the device node is mounted into the container. Leave empty when using a network-attached coordinator.

env.description: Environment variables injected into the Zigbee2MQTT container.

externalSecrets.description: External Secrets Operator integration for pulling secrets from an external secret store. Requires [ESO](https://external-secrets.io) installed in the cluster. Each item creates an `ExternalSecret` that syncs a secret into a Kubernetes `Secret`, which is then mounted into the Zigbee2MQTT container under `/app/data`.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full resource name prefix.

httproutes.description: Gateway API `HTTPRoute` resources. Requires [Gateway API CRDs](https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io).

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to `Chart.appVersion` when empty.

ingress.description: Standard Kubernetes Ingress resource. Use when a Gateway API HTTPRoute is not available.

annotations.description: Annotations merged onto the Ingress resource.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names and labels.

namespaceLabels.description: Extra labels merged onto the Namespace created by this chart.

extraEgress.description: Extra egress rules appended to the NetworkPolicy (both Cilium and Kubernetes).

extraIngress.description: Extra ingress rules appended to the NetworkPolicy (both Cilium and Kubernetes).

enabled.description: Enable standard Kubernetes NetworkPolicy rendering. Works with any CNI that supports NetworkPolicy.

mqttNamespace.description: Namespace of the MQTT broker (e.g. EMQX). When set, adds an egress rule on port 1883.

prometheusNamespace.description: Namespace where Prometheus runs. When set, adds an ingress rule allowing Prometheus scraping on port 8080.

persistence.description: Persistent storage for the Zigbee2MQTT `/app/data` directory.

storageClassName.description: StorageClass name. Defaults to the cluster default when empty.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the Zigbee2MQTT container.

annotations.description: Annotations merged onto the Service resource.

port.description: Port to expose. Zigbee2MQTT frontend listens on 8080 by default.
